query: SELECT name, company, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT project ORDER BY project SEPARATOR ' | ') as projects FROM contacts GROUP BY name, company HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT name, company, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT project ORDER BY project SEPARATOR ' | ') as projects FROM contacts GROUP BY name, company HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 30;
